message:
fix: use workingDir variable in docker exec command

- docker exec was hardcoded to -w /workspace
- Should use workingDir variable which is set correctly per platform
- Fixes 'no such file or directory' error on macOS

files.patch:
@@ -256,7 +256,7 @@ func Run(config *RunConfig) error {
 		filepath.Base(cmdPath),
 		"exec",
 		"-it",
-		"-w", "/workspace",
+		"-w", workingDir,
 		containerID,
 	}
 	execArgs = append(execArgs, config.Command...)
